creator: xmj@chaot.net
text:
Description:
- Update to 2.2.00
- Take maintainership
- Remove pkg-message
- Specify license

* builds with clang34, clang33, gcc on all supported systems

* Developers of Minc2 consider version 2.2.00 stable:
>From: "Vladimir S. FONOV" <vladimir.fonov@gmail.com>
>To: Johannes Meixner <xmj@chaot.net>
>Subject: Re: Minc 2.2.0
> 
>Hello Johannes,
>  
>yes, I would say that 2.2.0 was the last stable release (
>http://packages.bic.mni.mcgill.ca/tgz/minc-2.2.00.tar.gz )


Responsible committer (swills@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

portlint: irrelevant warnings
port test: ok
testport: ok
